{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. with Anthropic's Cowork Platform


{quote}_Document type:_ Practical implementation paper, building{quote}

----





h2. with Anthropic's Cowork Platform

_Document type:_ Practical implementation paper, building 
on Document 2.3's theoretical framework

_Position in series:_ Document 2.4 — sequenced after 
Document 2.3's identification of the Layer B gap, providing 
concrete implementation path through Cowork integration

_Companion paper to:_
* Nautilus Portal Protocol v1.1 (Document 1)
* Review Methodology v1.0 (Document 2)
* Infrastructure for AI-Collaborative Intellectual Work v1.0 
  (Document 2.3)
* Double-Triangle Architecture v1.0 (Document 3)
* Open Knowledge Work Foundation v1.0 (Document 4)
* Representative Agent Layer v1.0 (Document 5)
* Professional Colleague Agents v1.0 (Document 6)
* Composite Skills Agent v1.0 (Document 7)

_Reference projects:_
* InGit (https://github.com/svend4/ingit) — author's 
  offline-first integrated platform for version control, 
  project management, and documentation
* Anthropic Cowork (https://claude.com/product/cowork) — 
  agentic interface in Claude Desktop launched January 2026

_Version:_ 1.0.0-draft
_Date:_ 2026-04-26
_Author:_ svend4
_Editorial collaboration:_ Claude
_License:_ CC BY 4.0
_Status:_ Practical implementation paper, seeking 
collaboration

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl|251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl.md] (сходство 0.39)
* [274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code|274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code.md] (сходство 0.39)
* [209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md] (сходство 0.34)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code|274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code.md]
* [251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl|251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl.md]
* [209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md]
* [167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex|167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex.md]


h2. Упоминается в

* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|../README.md]


h2. Связанные документы

* [Appendix A: Connection to Companion Papers|184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers.md] _66%_
* [A Typology of AI Agents on the Principal Side and the Case for Profession-Specific Co-Workers|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md] _66%_
* [Существующие документы DHLab (твой context)|355-существующие-документы-dhlab-твой-context.md] _66%_
* [AI Support Through Configurable Specialist Ensembles|251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl.md] _53%_
* [The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code|274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code.md] _53%_
* [References|268-references.md] _37%_
* [Acknowledgments|319-acknowledgments.md] _37%_
* [Acknowledgments|146-acknowledgments.md] _33%_
